name: Vanillate sensor (VanR + CRISPRa)
shortDescription: Detects vanillate/vanillin (lignin-degradation and food/flavour marker). The Marionette VanR sensor gates a CRISPRa circuit driving a fluorescent reporter, in safe E. coli K-12.

input.detects: Vanillate in lignin-processing streams, food, and fermentation

sensing.sensorMechanism: VanR de-represses the Pvan promoter on binding vanillate.
sensing.signalFlow: Vanillate -> VanR releases Pvan -> transcribes an sgRNA -> dCas9-activator amplifies a fluorescent reporter (CRISPRa) -> fluorescence rises with vanillate.

parts.name: VanR regulator
parts.source: Marionette sensor (Meyer et al. 2019); Caulobacter van system
parts.notes: Vanillate-responsive repressor, characterised as an orthogonal Marionette sensor.

parts.name: Reporter-activating sgRNA
parts.source: designed for CRISPRa upstream of a weak reporter promoter

performance.notes: VanR is a characterised orthogonal Marionette sensor; integrated CRISPRa device is a design template.

safety.biocontainment: Lab/contained; add kill-switch for field use.
safety.notes: E. coli K-12 non-pathogenic BSL-1 host.

buildSteps.title: Design CRISPRa sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target a weak reporter promoter; check host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: VanR + Pvan -> sgRNA. TU2: dCas9-omega. TU3: weak promoter -> sfGFP.

provenance.source: Design template combining the Marionette VanR vanillate sensor with E. coli CRISPRa
partsSources: Meyer et al. 2019, Nat. Chem. Biol. (Marionette sensors, VanR)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
